segments.text: It was very nice to come to Reading again and meet with a lot of people like your Mayor
another person who was interviewing me at the radio station. I am discovering new talents
in this place which is really historically important but, in the history of spirituality
England as a whole has to play
very,very important role
which perhaps English people don't
realize. William Blake
said that,that England
had become Jerusalem
it's became holy land
and you all have
become holy people
he is not liar
People can say
visionary
visualized things beyond his
foresight
That's not a fact because about Sahaja Yoga he has written very vividly, clearly as to
where I'll be staying since my arrival in England.
Where our ashram is going it so beautifully done and feel this land have something special
about them produce or create such great poets ,such great seers . India of course
is a country of yoga, no doubt.
But there also we had great poet about
the same time as Blake may be little earlier Gyaneshwara
he did write about Kundalini
He has described times
of Sahaja Yoga
by saying that at this point
The people who are in darkness
and blind
will see light
He's also gone further to say that those people who will receive light,
we'll be able to enlighten other people.
But William Blake has very clearly said
men of God
Will become prophets and these prophets
We have powers
To make others' prophets
And this is the test
That you should put through everything
How I became a prophet?
I mean, it's all right there are many people who are around
for selling their things.
And you know what they're doing to attract more people?
Like the mayor asked me that
as your work is so fantastic
You must be serving thousands of peopIe
and said no!
I don't
Sometimes i receive five or sometimes ten
He was amazed
he says how can this happen

I receive very few people to come into my program and if they come and stick on for
a while, then get Realization all right.
But there are many who came – he was quite amazed!
He said really but i am surprised you don't charge any money ,there is no membership
.I mean it really shows that its something divine
And still how has been few people coming to You?
I said, �I will ask the same question to you because I don�t understand human being.�
You better answer me that why so few people come and take advantage of this Sahaja Yoga
which gives your power is lying within.
Which give what have already existing in it?
It's own property still they do not come even if we tell them freely you are going
to be given all your bank balances. Please come, please come." But they don't
Come! So I said instead of asking Me this question for the first time let me ask you
This Question –I can't understand- but in Indian villages is a different thing where
The people coming thousands one other reasons may
Be that People do not know much about Kundalini
They are naive
About That and
They do not know what it means by the word self-realization.
What is a Self and why should It happen to us?

word self realization has been used since long time many marketeers
And nobody have given it
Now if somebody says yes can happen to you
Just can happen. I think, there should be real interest
but still i cannot explain why? Why is it that few people come and those who
also do not stick on them they have no patience
But with other gurus he asked me
No! There are many more thousands and thousands
just one fellow whom the British
These people have given 58 Rolls Royce and then they gave him a 59th one because he wouldn't
come without getting the Rolls-Royce from them.
So, They starved themselves for 1 year & give Him the 59th Rolls-Royce!
And how many must've done it?
50 thousand people collected that money to get this fellow down here already now
He has 59th I think you must be waiting for the 60th.
Now won'be surprised if there will again collecting money for him
One must understand that you cannot pay for God.
You can not buy God by giving him Rolls Royce,
he doesn't understands Rolls Royce
He doesnt' understand money
,he dosn''t understand bank
...he don't know the mint
…he dont's now that
we are having a new system of
this paper money
....he is not aware off these things
but somehow
We're so much used to these mundane
mundane things, irregular things that we personally all of us feel
That if it is going to be God
He has just like Us. There should an organization
there's a chairman and vice-chairman
there must have been a secretary
All these organizations are there
And only when they go then its over
Then you're safe, secure
Because your used
But Gods laws
and Gods domain
Is very different from what we understand
We have never felt His love, we've been always working all over our organization because
were insecure about something.
Every institution is for some kind of an insecurity – because you are insecure and think that
Something's going to fall upon us or something horrible will happen so it forms a thing
otherwise the children may be spoiled or old people die or if anything happens then
form an organization. This is not believing in God! Secondly, we also form organizations
because of hate but have never seen the power a flower which has been most beautiful blissful
and smoothly working like a flower becoming fruit. Have you ever see flowers become fruits?
Nobody had seen it how slowly it becomes. Have you even seen a bud opening into a

All is done by this great power of God,
This divine Power which called as Brahma in Sanskrit language
and know that brahma
Is the idea behind Self-realization
It's all pervading it working everywhere
but we cannot feel And you need To Feel That
How do you feel?
How to know that?
Only way is, get yourself connected with your Self which connects you
through the All-pervading Power and it starts flowing though
You. If we learn ways & methods then we can maneuver
It, We Can use It
And give To others also

if u have put on the lights u just have to switch On
It's like that, it is very simple.

to God…
All That!
Where He is?
What he is?
And what We Are?
We have never known that.
So first time you get connected with His power, now about Spirit – I mean in English language
spirit is used for so many things they will use it a dead body as the spirit and also

which is the witness,
it watches every moment
and every action of ours

To understand this Spirit
we have to know its nature
what's The Nature Of This Spirit Is
Then when We get Enlightenment
What happens to us?
Now here you've seen three powers as they're shown
First power on right hand side
is the power of action and I mean,
first one is a Power Of Desire which
on left hand side.

These Three Powers Act Within Us
For Example
The First Power Of Desires
The First Power Of desire within us
Acts In Such A Manner
that we start desiring for things.
Actually, the whole universe is created

special thing called Human Being
is the residual power
that resides in the triangular bone

It hasn't yet manifested because we have now become one with the demand
So this power still sleeping within us and they call it sleeping Kundalini
but their desire is in us
And that drives to all kinds of seeking
We make mistakes

Everything can be forgiven

waiting for a chance when

that when you become one with the Divine,
When yoga – the union takes place

Kundalini has manifested itself.

One With The Divine

So now there are four powers I have told You about

which we desire other things
like they may desire
To Have a Check

because they can't see without a chair

Then we will go and share then when do I have a car
than even though having helicopter can't ever happen
so once in general are never satiated

That why

You like one thing,
jump to it and if you like another

Now this matter within us is created
by
right side
that's power
which comes from five elements

when they are not enlightened
do NOT give joy
They are within us
we use them
We think
Supposing somebody thinks

anything your own it's a headache

That way we are looking at things
but we think possession

Which not true because we're going take nothing with us
Now when these five elements act upon us, what happens to us?
What do we develop.
We developed in the subtle way attention
say there is something a matter here
my attention can be drawn through it
if that is material
My Attention Can Be Drawn Through It
but supposing Something Is In The Aether I Cannot See
Something That's Not Material I Cannot see
so the attention cannot be drawn
That's how our attention is created by these five elements, within ourselves.
Now this attention that we have naturally because it

Of These elements
Our Attention goes to material things
Natural

It is an impossible situation because anything that happens outside our attention goes

You don't know where To go or How to find it

this Kundalini rises

means that this attention has a light.

in and out of it

so if you pay attention somebody,
